description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:alpine Docker image. Define a global before_script that installs build dependencies with apk add gcc musl-dev jpeg-dev zlib-dev libffi-dev cairo-dev pango-dev gdk-pixbuf and installs MkDocs and its plugins via pip (mkdocs, mkdocs-material, pymdown-extensions, markdown-blockdiag, markdown-include, mkdocs-pdf-export-plugin). Add a single job named pages in the deploy stage that runs ENABLE_PDF_EXPORT=0 mkdocs build, then removes any existing public directory and moves the generated site folder to public, publishes the public/ directory as a Pages artifact, and runs only on the master branch.
